subject: Implement Phase 0 & Phase 1 foundation for inter-company tool
body:
Phase 0 (Preparation):
- Complete codebase audit with architecture documentation
- Design data models for 3-perspective output schema
- Design compliance scoring schema
- Plan state management structure

Phase 1 (Foundation Infrastructure):
- Add model registry system with Model 1 (Cost-Plus) and 6 variants
- Implement three-perspective framework (Developer/Buyer/Combined)
- Add South African tax inputs (27% rate, Section 11(e))
- Add entity configuration schemas
- Create mode switcher between pricing and inter-company calculators
- Implement state management for new features

New files:
- docs/PHASE_0_PREPARATION.md - Phase 0 findings
- models/intercompany/registry.js - Model registry
- models/intercompany/model-1-cost-plus.js - First inter-company model
- state/app-state.js - State management
- ui/intercompany/*.js - UI components for inter-company calculator
title: Implement Phase 0 & Phase 1 foundation for inter-company tool
